summary: Add 35 novel analytics and operator workflow commands, plus GraphQL order data enhancement.
reason: Turn raw synced Shopify data into actionable e-commerce intelligence and operator workflows while keeping the existing CLI patch local, SQL-primary, read-only, and testable via --db overrides.
validated_outcome: Seeded SQLite command tests cover order, customer, product, inventory, operations, dashboard, growth, ops, merchandising, and store workflow command groups through Cobra with --json and --db.
